name: p0
description: A Codex plan gate that reviews implementation plans for P0 blockers before code changes.

interface.longDescription: P0 makes Codex stop before implementation, inspect the real code paths behind a proposed plan, revise around any P0 blockers, and continue the review loop until the plan is clear or blocked.
defaultPrompt: Use /plan p0 to gate this plan before implementation.
Use $p0 to review this change for P0 blockers.
